data.content:
# Implementation Plan: Domain logic and app methods for execution plan editing

## Files to Create/Modify

### New: `src/domain/execution_plan_edit.rs` (~180 lines)
Pure functions operating on ExecutionPlanData:

```rust
pub struct CascadeInfo {
    pub affected_knot_ids: Vec<String>,
    pub step_count: usize,
}

pub fn add_wave(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, name: String, objective: String, at: Option<u32>) -> ExecutionPlanData
pub fn remove_wave(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, wave_index: u32) -> Result<(ExecutionPlanData, CascadeInfo), PlanEditError>
pub fn move_wave(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, from: u32, to: u32) -> Result<ExecutionPlanData, PlanEditError>
pub fn add_step(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, wave_index: u32, knot_ids: Vec<String>, notes: Option<String>, at: Option<u32>) -> Result<ExecutionPlanData, PlanEditError>
pub fn remove_step(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, wave_index: u32, step_index: u32) -> Result<(ExecutionPlanData, CascadeInfo), PlanEditError>
pub fn move_step(plan: &ExecutionPlanData, wave_index: u32, from: u32, to: u32) -> Result<ExecutionPlanData, PlanEditError>
fn renumber_waves(plan: &mut ExecutionPlanData)
fn renumber_steps(wave: &mut ExecutionPlanWave)
```

PlanEditError enum: WaveNotFound, StepNotFound, IndexOutOfBounds.

### New: `src/domain/execution_plan_edit_tests.rs` (~200 lines)
Unit tests for all pure functions.

### Modified: `src/domain/mod.rs`
Add `pub mod execution_plan_edit;`

### New: `src/app/execution_plan_edit.rs` (~120 lines)
App methods that use domain functions:

```rust
impl App {
    pub fn plan_edit_wave_add(&self, id: &str, name: String, objective: String, at: Option<u32>) -> Result<KnotView, AppError>
    pub fn plan_edit_wave_remove(&self, id: &str, wave_index: u32) -> Result<(KnotView, CascadeInfo), AppError>
    pub fn plan_edit_wave_move(&self, id: &str, from: u32, to: u32) -> Result<KnotView, AppError>
    pub fn plan_edit_step_add(&self, id: &str, wave_index: u32, knot_ids: Vec<String>, notes: Option<String>, at: Option<u32>) -> Result<KnotView, AppError>
    pub fn plan_edit_step_remove(&self, id: &str, wave_index: u32, step_index: u32) -> Result<(KnotView, CascadeInfo), AppError>
    pub fn plan_edit_step_move(&self, id: &str, wave_index: u32, from: u32, to: u32) -> Result<KnotView, AppError>
}
```

Each method: resolve id -> lock -> read knot -> apply edit -> emit KnotExecutionPlanDataSet event -> update cache -> return view.

### Modified: `src/app/mod.rs` (or wherever app modules are declared)
Add `mod execution_plan_edit;`

## Test Strategy

- Unit tests in execution_plan_edit_tests.rs for pure functions
- Integration tests in app layer testing full lock->event->cache flow
- Edge cases: empty plan, out-of-bounds indices, waves with no steps, steps with no knot_ids

## Complexity: Low-Medium (~500 lines total)
## Risks: None significant - straightforward data structure operations
